\tzpentry{ID3558}{Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3558 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \hat H(t) = \hat H_0 + \hat V_{\rm int} + \int d^d r\; V_{\text{drive}}(\mathbf r,t)\,\hat\psi^\dagger(\mathbf r)\hat\psi(\mathbf r). \]
